# CWE-252 positive: ignores error from critical write
lang: go
file: CWE-252-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-252 Unchecked Return Value
// Vulnerable line: WriteFile error discarded with blank identifier.
func PersistAudit(c *gin.Context) {
	entry := []byte(c.PostForm("entry"))
	os.WriteFile("/var/log/audit.log", entry, 0o600)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "stored"})
}
